attributes.description: Authentication & session events from EVTX. Successful logon (4624), failed logon (4625), logoff (4634/4647), explicit logon (4648), special-privilege logon (4672), inbound RDP (4778/4779), account created/added/removed (4720/4732/4724). Cross-reference with the execution and exfil panels: a 2am 4624 followed by a 3am file-sharing visit tells a story.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"_index : evtxlogs-* and winlog.event_id : (4624 or 4625 or 4634 or 4647 or 4648 or 4672 or 4720 or 4724 or 4732 or 4738 or 4740 or 4767 or 4778 or 4779)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Insider Threat: Authentication & Session (EVTX logon family)
